name: Brennan
description: A young human soldier assigned by Sgt. Marge Bregson to accompany the party back to Droomen Knoll. Bright smile, unmarred leather armor, spear and shield. Sent as an informant in service of the town.
notes: Sent with the party by Sgt. Bregson as an informant, on the condition the party protect him.
Accompanied the party on their second descent into Droomen Knoll.
